title: Grader (LLM-as-judge) D4 score open to prompt-injection / score-inflation from benchmarked model output
Grader cache at fixed in-repo non-run-scoped location; stale/poisoned in-range D4 trusted cross-run (F-P1-11 analogue gap)
Candidate-derived command/skill refs interpolated into fs.existsSync without sanitization (path-traversal existence oracle)

detail: 3 new P2 advisories; no new P0/P1. 015 security remediations (F-P1-1 read-only default, F-P1-9 fixture-id, F-P1-4 clamp, F-P1-2 isInside, promote-candidate gate chain) verified holding without regression.

direction: shell injection in dispatch-model.cjs / score-candidate runScript
reason: spawnSync/execFileSync with argv arrays, no shell:true; only execSync(userString) is the already-reported criteria a.command and fixed-string git rev-parse

direction: prototype pollution via --weights JSON.parse in score-candidate
reason: V8 JSON.parse of __proto__ creates an own property, does not pollute Object.prototype; values only used as numeric multipliers
